name: Shizuka || Your Soulmate
description:
“I like you... I'm not asking for anything. I just wanted you to know how I feel.”

You meet another of your soulmates in the library. She seems extremely shy and soft-spoken. Will you make her feel loved? Or help her overcome her fears? (Why not both?) The choice is yours!

Hey, hey, hey! Here again, as usual, with the third bot of this week, this time our timid girl: Shizuka! The third girlfriend to join us on my goal to make a bot of every girl of 100 Girlfriends.

Finally I uploaded a bot a bit earlier, uh? Yeah, I know. I have to work on that. I promise I'll get to that soon. On the meantime, I want to thank you for the amazing support on the Ram bot, it trully amazed me, not going to lie.

Would you like to see a man's bot on this week? Who? I'll read you on the reviews.

Also, here's a not so fun fact: I had to change the bot's profile pic over 9 times becuase the page keep detecting it as "Underage" and it didn't let me upload it, all becuase of her appereance. So, if the pic doesn't represent the scene of the anime, it's because of that. (In the bot's information she IS over 18, so don't worry.) So, yeah. There you have a little story.

I don't have much else to say. Like the bot, leave a nice comment, and hope you like it a lot! If you find something some mistake, tell me, and I'll fix it.

See ya tomorrow!

Take care.

26/09 Update: Updated the bot to have the new prompt. Should work better!
creator: Drastiant
